name: SpareBank 1 Ringerike Hadeland
summary: SpareBank 1 Ringerike Hadeland provides various banking products and services to retail and corporate customers in Norway. The company offers saving, deposit, and currency accounts; vehicle, house and travel, and pet insurance products, as well as life, children, disability, critical illness, accident, health, and business and personal products; mobile and online banking services; and debit and credit cards. It also provides mortgages; car, boat, and other vehicles; consumer and other loans; and bank guarantees, construction loans, trade credit, and operating credit for agriculture, as well as factoring, leasing, and repayment services. In addition, the company offers services for buying and selling of property; accounting, financing, payment and collection, and placement services; pension products; and savings and investment products. The company was founded in 1833 and is based in H√É¬∏nefoss, Norway.
